original: You radio in an anonymous report to the nearest UGC Peacekeeper station before making yourself scarce. You don’t need to deal with that kind of paperwork.
With your forfeit, the fight is over. You
sigh and sit in your chair while the Star Viper ship docks with yours.
You’re not sure who or what’s going to come down the corridor but when the airlock hisses and the ship’s occupant emerges, you have to admit it’s not what you expected.

Before you stands a red-headed snakegirl standing on two legs and wielding a little pistol, her orange-scaled skin crisscrossed with vibrant, glowing purple tiger stripes. She strides towards you without hesitation and bends over, exposing her impressive cleavage, staring straight into your [pc.eyes].
“You’re going to be a good [pc.boyGirl] and give me all your credits, aren’t you?” she murmurs, stroking your face while the extravagant patterns on her body pulse hypnotically. “Every last bit...”
You stare back at her uncomprehending until you feel a minor itch at the edge of your mind. She’s trying to psychically compel you but...
“I think we could make a deal?” you say, and her head whips back as she gasps.
“H-how- damn it!” she curses, cheeks flushing with color as she shakily aims her pistol at you. “D-don’t make any funny moves...”
“Whoa there,” you say, raising your hands in a friendly manner. “I’m not planning on resisting. Well, except for the psychic powers.”
“Ugh,” she grumbles, her plump lips stretching into a fine line. “I’m- I’m not very good at that, alright? It’s a work in progress.”
The curvy snakegirl looks embarrassed enough about it already but before you’ve even made the decision not to press her on it, she’s pushing onwards.
“I’m just new! Not all of us just- command the power of the stars from day one, you know,” she says, gesturing frantically. “Some of us- some of us have to train.”
She watches you with narrow-eyed suspicion.
It’s the same snakegirl you’ve run into before, and she’s glaring at you in determined fashion. Walking up to you, she’s almost sitting in your lap as she bends over and stares into your [pc.eyes].
“You’re going to give me all your credits or all-” she stops, eyes shifting sideways before she glances back at you, cheeks discolored. “All your credits or all your cock. Just like I want.”
The sensual snakegirl leans back and considers you. “Is it working?”
“In a manner of speaking,” you murmur, feeling your [pc.cocks] harden, “yes.”
“You’re going to give me all your credits, aren’t you?” she murmurs, studying you intensely. “... Is it working?”
You stay silent and avert your eyes, glancing back when you hear her sigh.

original: Pay off the pirate, if that’s what it takes.
You don’t have enough money for this...

When you let her know that you don’t have very much money... or genitalia either, the greedy alien fumes. “For real?” She looks almost disappointed to pull out a stun-gun and aim its discharge at your chest.\n\nEverything goes black..."+(pc.credits>0?" and your credit wallet is empty when you awaken.":"")+"
If it’ll avoid your death, you’re willing to pay the pirate toll. Punching chit numbers into the console, you digitally transfer 5000 credits to the venomous raider.
Her voice almost sounds surprised when it blasts back through the comm. “Oh. Really? O-okay then! Be a dear and bring me more credits next time.”
You’re left fuming as the interloper activates her ship’s light drip and vanishes into the countless stars.
“Okay, we’re here,” you tell the snakegirl pirate, nodding at the console as she peers over your shoulder. “Make your escape, or whatever it is you do.”

“Thank you so much,” she says, leaning back when you turn to face her. Averting her eyes, she continues. “And um, thanks for the... fun. I- I mean, I hope it was as fun for you as it was for me. I didn’t expect you to be so giving or skilled.”
“Sounds like you don’t want to go back out there,” you venture, smiling.
“I- damn,” she mutters. “No, I do. But...” she hesitates, biting her lip and turning away. “Thanks for the ride.”
“Suit yourself,” you say, shrugging. You watch her walk down the corridor, hips and butt swaying hypnotically. “Feel free to come back soon.”
Then she’s gone, and your ship is down one snakegirl. Still, it was nice while it lasted - and you have a feeling you’ll run into her again, anyway.
